content.text:
I mean... it's bad. Like it reflects poorly. My boss would see that I'm not -- 

*[stops]*

He gave me this role and I think he took a chance on me, honestly. I'm the youngest person at this level. And if I go into Thursday and I don't have answers, or I don't know what he's asking, or I say the wrong thing...

*[quieter, slightly slower without noticing it]*

I don't know. It just can't go badly. It can't.

*[picks back up]*

Which is why I need to prep, right? So can we figure out what I need to prep? Like what's the most important thing to have ready?
